items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: It's great to finally see what's captured in those pictures.

options.text: So, you planned to show me this?

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Ah… Sorry, I didn't mean to hide this from you.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: This mission was supposed to be a surprise.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: After that crisis, I found some old pictures while cleaning Necrostar's waste data.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Ah… I forgot to tell you this. Sorry.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: I found them while cleaning Necrostar's waste data. But they're too old to be sourced.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: I saw you in those pictures, gazing at the Aetherfins.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Whoever took them is... a mystery now.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: But they must be precious to both you and that person.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: Speaking of which, I've always wanted to thank you properly since last time.

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: How about I take a picture of the scenery here for you as a keepsake?

items.speaker: KU-Key
items.text: The past may be gone, but new stories are always waiting!
